item.name: DSR Delete Propagation

tags.processCatalogL1: CI.00 Customer Data Platform (Unified Customer Data)

item.description: Cloud flow orchestrating right-to-erasure: tombstones the unified profile, calls the CI-Data delete API, and notifies downstream systems via Azure Service Bus.

_powerAutomate.name: DSR Delete Propagation
_powerAutomate.trigger: On Create where con_consenttype = DSR - Delete
